content.text: 强制跳转到HTTPS协议，将HTTP转换为HTTPS。Forces redirect to HTTPS protocol, converting HTTP to HTTPS

```ts
// 使用当前页面地址，若为 HTTP 则跳转至 HTTPS
httpsRedirect(); // 若当前为 http://example.com 则跳转到 https://example.com
```

```ts
httpsRedirect('http://example.com/page'); // -> 跳转到 https://example.com/page
httpsRedirect('https://example.com'); // 已是 HTTPS，无操作
```

summary.text: 跳转地址（可选，默认为当前页面地址）。The URL to redirect (optional, defaults to current page URL)

text.comment: 跳转地址（可选，默认为当前页面地址）。The URL to redirect (optional, defaults to current page URL)

Function:

httpsRedirect

Description:

强制跳转到HTTPS协议，将HTTP转换为HTTPS。Forces redirect to HTTPS protocol, converting HTTP to HTTPS

Returns:
Example:
// 使用当前页面地址，若为 HTTP 则跳转至 HTTPS
httpsRedirect(); // 若当前为 http://example.com 则跳转到 https://example.com
Example:
httpsRedirect('http://example.com/page'); // -> 跳转到 https://example.com/page
httpsRedirect('https://example.com'); // 已是 HTTPS，无操作
